Graphic Design · Branding & Social Media
Bakery & Chocolate Brand Identity

Full brand identity for two bakery and chocolate brands (CakieBakie & Cocoa Bliss) — logo design, festive campaign creatives (Diwali, Dhanteras), social media posts, visiting cards, and product promo creatives. Built a warm, indulgent identity that connected customers online and offline.

Graphic Design · Multi-Brand
Logos, Social Media & Brand Collateral

Developed cohesive visual identities across multiple brands — Sphere, IranAir, SpiceMix and more. Deliverables included logos, social media posts (Black Friday promos, food creatives), brochures, visiting cards, and festive campaigns with consistent visual language.
